scripts.api:prod: nx build api --configuration=production && cd apps/api && node dist/main.js
scripts.test:unit: nx test website && nx test api -- --testPathIgnorePatterns=integration\.spec\.ts$
scripts.test-integration:api: POSTGRES_DB=test npm run db:reset && POSTGRES_DB=test nx test api -- --runInBand --testPathPatterns=integration\.spec\.ts$
scripts.db:reset: tsx libs/migrations/ensure-database.ts && tsx libs/migrations/reset-database.ts && npm run migrate
scripts.ai-eval:node-job-evaluator: POSTGRES_DB=eval npm run db:reset && POSTGRES_DB=eval tsx --tsconfig apps/ai-evaluation/tsconfig.app.json apps/ai-evaluation/src/node-job-evaluator/job-evaluator.dataset.ts && POSTGRES_DB=eval tsx --tsconfig apps/ai-evaluation/tsconfig.app.json apps/ai-evaluation/src/node-job-evaluator/job-evaluator-gemma3:12b.eval.ts
scripts.ai-eval:graph: POSTGRES_DB=eval npm run db:reset && POSTGRES_DB=eval tsx --tsconfig apps/ai-evaluation/tsconfig.app.json apps/ai-evaluation/src/graph/graph-dataset.ts && POSTGRES_DB=eval tsx --tsconfig apps/ai-evaluation/tsconfig.app.json apps/ai-evaluation/src/graph/graph-gemma.eval.ts
